title: Private Commitment
summary: Ada chooses disciplined monitoring over immediate reporting, ending the chapter on voluntary investigative commitment.

narrative.newInfo: Ada intentionally shifts from passive observer to active investigator.
narrative.dripHook: The next event is now being awaited with method, not fear.
narrative.payoffDelivered: Decision reward: chapter closes on action posture and propulsion.
narrative.notes: End quietly but decisively; this sets clean handoff into Chapter 2 rupture.

rewardTokens.description: Ada commits to logging and monitoring before escalation.
